overall.description: A static first-person view from a high-end cyberpunk apartment bedroom, featuring an unmade bed in the foreground and a panoramic window revealing a rain-soaked, neon-lit cityscape at night. The scene showcases cinematic game engine rendering with moody blue-green atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, showing an unmade bed in the foreground and a panoramic window revealing a rainy, neon-lit cityscape at night. The room features modern furniture including a white bench against a tiled wall and a small nightstand with a glowing device, all rendered in cinematic game engine quality with moody atmospheric lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a cyberpunk bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a private interior and a sprawling, rain-soaked metropolis. It begins with a focus on the intimate clutter of an unmade bed in the foreground, set against the moody blue-green atmospheric lighting of the room. The view then expands to encompass the modern interior, highlighting a white bench against a tiled wall and a small nightstand with a glowing device. Finally, the gaze settles on the panoramic window, where the interior stillness gives way to the vibrant, neon-lit cityscape shimmering through a veil of falling rain.
